overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a sunlit Toussaint village with distinctive stone and timber architecture, passing NPC villagers and transitioning from the village center into a wooded stream area. The clip features bright summer lighting and detailed medieval fantasy environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: village square with ornate stone manor house

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the village square, passing NPCs and observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress sweeping the cobblestone path with a broom

entered.detail: two-story stone building with red timber framing and arched doorway, distinctive Toussaint architecture
rustic wooden structure with slanted roof
irregular stone paving covering the village ground

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a sunlit village square dominated by an ornate stone manor house with red timber accents. A woman sweeps the cobblestone path nearby while other villagers stand scattered around the open area. The scene is bright and warm with clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with red timber buildings and wooden stalls

events.description: moving from the open square into a narrower village street with different architecture

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through the village, passing by various villagers and wooden structures

notable_agents.action: villager in yellow shirt standing near wooden logs

entered.detail: two-story building with red painted timber framing and weathered stone walls
wooden wagon with wheels parked near the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves from the open square into a narrower village street lined with a prominent red timber-framed building. The cobblestone path continues past wooden carts and scattered construction materials. Villagers in period clothing walk or stand along the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: village edge with work areas and wooden fencing

events.description: entering a shaded area under building overhangs, creating dappled light patterns

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the village edge, passing a man working at a wooden table and approaching a more natural area

notable_agents.action: shirtless muscular man working at a wooden workbench, handling tools

entered.detail: rough wooden table with tools where a villager is working
low stone wall running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The path leads along the village edge where a shirtless man works at a wooden bench. The lighting becomes more shaded under building overhangs. Stone walls and wooden fences line the route as the village transitions toward a more natural, wooded environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested path leading to wooden bridge over stream

events.description: leaving the village entirely and entering dense forest with tall trees and stream

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking into the dense forest, approaching a wooden bridge over a stream

entered.detail: tall dense evergreen trees creating a canopy overhead
rustic wooden footbridge crossing over the stream
narrow waterway with clear water flowing through the forest

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the village behind and enters a dense forest with tall cypress trees blocking most of the sky. The ground changes from cobblestone to a dirt trail. A wooden bridge appears ahead crossing a small stream, marking the transition from civilization to wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, bustling village square into the shaded seclusion of a dense forest. It begins in a sunlit open area dominated by an ornate stone manor house and villagers tending to cobblestone paths under a clear blue sky. As the camera follows Geralt, the scene narrows into a village street lined with red timber-framed buildings and wooden carts before shifting toward the village edge where stone walls and wooden fences create a more shaded atmosphere. The environment then opens up as the cobblestones give way to a dirt trail, leading the camera away from the settlement and into a thick grove of tall cypress trees. Finally, the path crosses a wooden bridge over a small stream, completing the transition from the civilized village to the wild forest.
